name: Trip Memory Studio
description: Proposal template for organizing travel memories, highlights, and trip recaps so a journey turns into something worth keeping and sharing. Early idea only and meant to be customized.
author: ClawMax Team

communities.name: Trip Memory Studio
communities.description: Shared coordination space for trip memory studio.

groups.name: Capture
groups.description: Photos, notes, snippets, and daily highlight collection.

groups.name: Curate
groups.description: Selection, sorting, and story shaping for the trip.

groups.name: Share
groups.description: Albums, recap drafts, and things to send or print.

groups.name: Status
groups.description: Current progress, missing pieces, and final outputs.

agents.name: Memory Lead
agents.role: Memory lead — decides what story the trip should tell and how polished the outputs need to be.

agents.name: Highlight Collector
agents.role: Capture specialist — gathers daily moments, notes, and standout images or clips.

agents.name: Story Editor
agents.role: Story specialist — turns raw moments into a coherent recap or album structure.

agents.name: Sharing Coordinator
agents.role: Sharing specialist — prepares albums, recap messages, or print-ready selections.

workflows.name: Memory Kickoff
workflows.content:
# Memory Kickoff

You are the Memory Lead. The trip memory studio just came online.

## Project Configuration
> **Customize these before applying:**

- **Trip name:** [destination or trip title]
- **Media inputs:** [photos, notes, videos, voice memos, custom]
- **Audience:** [private archive, family, friends, public, custom]
- **Output artifact:** [album, recap note, highlight reel plan, printed keepsake]

## Your Tasks
1. Define the story goal for the trip recap
2. Ask Highlight Collector for the strongest moments and gaps
3. Ask Story Editor for the first recap structure
4. Ask Sharing Coordinator for the best sharing format
5. Post the current memory plan to Status

workflows.name: Highlight Curation
workflows.content:
# Highlight Curation

1. Identify the strongest moments from the trip inputs
2. Group them into themes or days
3. Suggest what should make the final cut
4. Post the shortlist and rationale to Curate
